[[BLOCK:slide8_shape1]]
Smith (2018): “Many Big-Data researchers believe that, the larger the number of possible explanatory variables, the more useful is Stepwise Regression for selecting explanatory variables. The reality is that Stepwise Regression is less effective the larger the number of potential explanatory variables. Stepwise Regression does not solve the Big-Data problem of too many explanatory variables. Big Data exacerbates the failings of Stepwise Regression.”  
https://doi.org/10.1186/s40537-018-0143-6
